rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings
Respect AADL scoping rules: type-level contracts for ports, implementation-level contracts for subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes
Do not introduce package-qualified names or data types not present in the analyzed model
Ensure AGREE contracts reflect the actual component structure and port relationships
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assignments in implementation scope must reference existing output features or declared variables
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not use event ports as numeric or Boolean values without explicit data representation
